title: helenium montanum
intro: Helenium montanum, also known as Mountain Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural expectorant and anti-inflammatory. The roots and leaves of the Mountain Sneezeweed have been used to treat various health issues, such as colds, coughs, and respiratory problems, and are also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies to promote health and well-being.
